title: Dutch-Style Potato Hash
description: A hearty, crispy side dish perfect for accompanying breakfast or brunch. Dutch potatoes and onions are pan-fried to perfection.
instructions: Peel the potatoes and grate them using a box grater.
Heat a large non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the hash to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the grated potatoes to the skillet and stir to combine with the hash.
Cook for 10-12 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the potatoes are golden brown and crispy.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
